title: Active Listening
prompt: A product manager says customers need stability, not new features, and also says they feel interrupted and exhausted in meetings. Which points should be acknowledged first? Submit JSON: {"optionIds":["A","B"]}.

options.text: They feel frustrated and not fully heard.
The core product need is stability over new features.
The product manager should be contradicted immediately.
The emotion should be ignored so scheduling can continue.
